title: LogCraftian
body:
**A small Data Pack that changes/adds 16 vanilla-friendly recipes, related to crafting with  logs and planks of all varieties!**

**Compatible with most MC versions from 1.14 - 1.20.4**


The primary function of the data pack is to **add** recipes for crafting with logs instead of planks. Things like chests, boats, stairs, and more! Gives more freedom for bulk crafting straight from logs _(like when you need to make 256 chests!)_ It also helps with storage since logs act as a "compressed" plank block that can still be crafted with.

All recipes modified in this Data Pack are applied to any log or plank variety found within vanilla Minecraft.

This Data Pack changes a few plank recipes to bring consistency to crafting things like stairs, slabs, ladders, etc. _(Full Recipe Changelog Below)_

**All vanilla recipes from planks and logs remain included! Outputs have been modified, as stated above, but the crafting layout has not changed. The only things added are the log crafting recipes.**

_May be incompatible with other data packs that change recipes or mods that add or modify recipes._


<details>
<summary>Changelog (lol get it? Log?! Hah!)</summary>

Logs to Sticks (16)

Planks to Trapdoor = 6 instead of 2

Planks to Stairs = 6 instead of 4

Bamboo Blocks to Planks = 4 instead of 2

Logs to Trapdoor (24)

Logs to Stairs (24)

Logs to "Wood" & "Hyphae" = 4 instead of 3

Logs to Slabs (24)

Logs to Pressure Plates (4)

Logs to Chests (4)

Logs to Boats & Rafts (4)

Ladders = 4 instead of 3

Planks to Ladders (8)

Logs to Ladders (32)

Fences = 4 instead of 3

Signs = 4 instead of 3

3x3x3 Grid of Logs makes 36 planks!

</details>

**Check out all my other projects on Modrinth!**
